subcodes.first_line: O ye who have turned spiritually to God and who are accepted at the Threshold of the Lord of Lords! Praise be to God that, through the outpourings of the clouds of the Kingdom [3.5s]... ...O God! Assist us in such wise that, destitute and insignificant though we be, we may still render service to Thy sacred threshold
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبلان روحانیان و مقبولان درگه حضرت یزدان الحمد لله از فیض سحاب ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
